article_title: Kali Linux 2026.1 Ships BackTrack Anniversary Mode, Eight New Security Tools, and Kernel 6.18

findings.message: Source fetched via Archive.org fallback (original returned 200)

content_preview.title: Kali Linux 2026.1 Ships BackTrack Anniversary Mode, Eight New Security Tools, and Kernel 6.18
content_preview.summary: Kali Linux 2026.1 commemorates BackTrack's 20th anniversary with a retro desktop mode, adds eight new security tools including an MCP server for Metasploit, and upgrades to kernel 6.18.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
Offensive Security released Kali Linux 2026.1 on March 25, delivering the annual theme refresh, eight new security tools, a kernel upgrade to 6.18, and a nostalgia-driven BackTrack mode marking two decades since the penetration testing distribution's predecessor first appeared.

## BackTrack Mode Marks 20th Anniversary

2026 marks the 20th anniversary of [BackTrack Linux](https://www.kali.org/blog/kali-linux-2026-1-release/), the Debian-based security distribution that preceded Kali and helped e...

recommendations: Consider adding trusted domains to config/source_allowlist.txt

editor_notes.content_quality: Good software release coverage with complete tool list and technical details.
editor_notes.source_verification: kali.org (fetched): Confirms all 8 tools, BackTrack 20th anniversary, kernel 6.18, 25 new packages, 183 updates, SDR issues, NetHunter. HelpNetSecurity (fetched): Independently confirms same facts.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Solid software release news. Ready for publication.
